blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
